title: Call of Duty movie will be set in the Modern Warfare universe and will premiere in 2028
summary: The film adaptation of the popular video game will be inspired by the Modern Warfare campaign and will hit theaters in 2028 according to multiple sources.

title: Cliff Bleszinski attributes LawBreakers and Boss Key's failure to his ego and alcohol
summary: The former Gears of War designer admits that his arrogance and personal problems contributed to the closure of his studio and LawBreakers' poor performance.

title: RTS Game of Thrones: War for Westeros delayed to 2027 to ensure quality
summary: Following its initial announcement, the strategy game based on the franchise delays its release until 2027 in order to meet quality expectations.

title: 007 First Light was originally going to be an ensemble game with all 00 agents, according to IO Interactive
summary: The game's director reveals that the initial project of 007 First Light featured the 00 agents working as a team, but later focused on James Bond.
